label: Skill gain
description: A skill level offset applied when this backstory is assigned to a pawn. Loaded from keyed child elements via LoadDataFromXmlCustom: element name is the SkillDef defName, text is the integer amount.

skill.label: Skill
skill.description: SkillDef that this gain entry modifies.

amount.label: Amount
amount.description: Integer offset applied to the skill level. May be negative to penalize the skill.
